modules.title: Ancient Egypt
modules.description: Discover the mysteries of pharaohs, pyramids, and hieroglyphics in one of history's greatest civilizations.

cards.title: The Rise of Egypt
cards.content: Ancient Egypt emerged around 3100 BCE with the unification of Upper and Lower Egypt under Pharaoh Narmer. This marked the beginning of the Early Dynastic Period and the formation of one of the world's greatest civilizations.

cards.title: Knowledge Check
cards.content: Test your understanding of Egyptian history

questions.question: In what year was Upper and Lower Egypt unified?
questions.explanation: Upper and Lower Egypt were unified around 3100 BCE under Pharaoh Narmer, marking the beginning of the Early Dynastic Period.
questions.hint: Think about the earliest dynasty of Egypt

questions.question: Pharaohs were considered divine rulers.
questions.explanation: Yes, Pharaohs were viewed as divine or semi-divine figures, which reinforced their authority and justified their power.
questions.hint: Consider how Egyptian society viewed their rulers

cards.title: The Pyramids of Giza
cards.content: The Great Pyramid of Khufu is one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. Built as a tomb for the pharaoh, it contains approximately 2.3 million limestone blocks, each weighing 2.5 tons on average. The pyramid stood as the world's tallest structure for 3,800 years.

cards.title: Pyramid Builder
cards.content: Congratulations! You've completed the first half of this module. You're on your way to becoming an Egyptian history expert!

modules.title: Industrial Revolution

modules.title: Quantum Physics

modules.title: Ancient Rome
